semantic_signals.compact_excerpt: Transportation Hints (Part 3) When transporting the lift truck by truck or rail, lower the forks and tilt the mast forward. Secure the lift truck with chains and binders. The tie-down points are indicated on the lift truck frame. Use only the designated tie-down points. Minimum chain size for tie-down: Grade 70 transport chain, 3/8 inch or equivalent. Ensure the engine is off and the parking brake
